path: Problem: Calculate a monthly percentage/rate by dividing a monthly count by the number of days in that month for a given year (handling leap years automatically)
Action: Use EOMONTH to get the last day of the target month and DAY to return the day number (days in month), then divide the count by that result
Observation: DAY(EOMONTH(date,0)) returns the number of days in the month of [date], automatically accounting for leap years when [date] is in February of a leap year
